summary: Comprehensive testing of Voice Island cinematic UI feature. Backend: 25/25 tests passed. Frontend: All 13 test scenarios from the review request passed. Voice Island opens at bottom-center with dark glassmorphism, correct orb/bars/controls, mute toggle, close functionality, text chat and feedback all working.

design_issues.screen: Sandbox info panel - Voice Island legend
issues: Processing legend color is #9333ea (purple) but actual processing orb is near-black rgba(12,12,16,.9) with purple spinner ring — minor legend vs. actual mismatch

Markdown not rendered in chat messages — shows **bold** as raw text. Pre-existing issue unrelated to voice island. The fmtMd helper is only used in widget.js, not in React SandboxTab message rendering.

passed_tests: GET /api/widget.js returns 200 with JS content-type
widget.js contains ep-vi-island CSS class
widget.js contains epViIn morph animation keyframe
widget.js contains epViOut morph animation keyframe
widget.js contains VSTATE voice state machine
widget.js contains ep-vi-orb, ep-vi-bars, ep-vi-wave elements
widget.js has bottom:24px + left:50% bottom-center positioning
widget.js has backdrop-filter:blur(24px) glassmorphism
widget.js has mute button (ep-vi-mute)
widget.js has SpeechRecognition + speechSynthesis + interimResults
widget.js has 800ms silence debounce
widget.js uses localStorage for persistence
Widget init API returns session_id and welcome_message
Sandbox init API returns session_id and welcome_message
Sandbox message stream returns SSE data
Auth /api/auth/me returns user info
Dashboard loads and shows project cards
Sandbox/Test Bot tab accessible from project detail
Voice mic button visible and clickable
Voice island opens at bottom-center after mic click (position: absolute, bottom: 24px, left: 50%)
Dark glassmorphism style: background rgba(0,0,0,0.75), backdropFilter blur(24px), border rgba(255,255,255,0.08)
Voice island orb, 7 audio bars, state label, transcript area, mute button all visible
Mute button changes visual style and island label → 'Muted — tap orb to speak'
Close button dismisses voice island from DOM and restores chat
Text chat type-and-send works with streaming AI response
Feedback thumbs up turns green after click (API call succeeds)
action_items: MINOR: Consider updating Processing legend color in SandboxTab.js from #9333ea to rgba(12,12,16,.9) or dark-with-spinner representation to match actual orb state
MINOR: Add dangerouslySetInnerHTML with fmtMd in SandboxTab message rendering if markdown support is desired (pre-existing, not related to voice island)
critical_code_review_comments: SandboxTab.js is 760 lines — approaching the 700-line limit. Consider splitting voice island JSX into a VoiceIsland sub-component for maintainability.

Processing state color mismatch: SandboxTab legend shows #9333ea (purple) but orbBg for processing is rgba(12,12,16,.9) (near-black). The widget.js also uses near-black for processing. Consider aligning the legend with the actual near-black + purple spinner visual.
seed_data_creation: Created test user (test-user-voice-1771688361698) and project (proj_b9a5b20fcba54b4d, api_key: ep_815100d4a7e74b3cb2e3243cc7ad5e07) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice Island UI fully implemented and working. Backend 100% passing. Key test credentials: session_token=test_session_voice_1771688361699, project_id=proj_b9a5b20fcba54b4d. Main bug to be aware of: widget.js closeVoice() sets fab.innerHTML=SVG_X_16 instead of SVG_CHAT after closing — the FAB shows X instead of chat bubble after voice mode closes.

rca_of_issues.fab_icon_behavior: Verified correct: widget.js FAB shows SVG_X_16 (close X) when chat is open, and SVG_CHAT (chat bubble) when chat is closed. The closeVoice() re-opens chat and sets X icon intentionally. No bug.
